name: lgmmo-forgekit-installer
description: One-command installer for LGM MMO ForgeKit into the current project.

scripts.test: node skills/auto/scripts/auto.test.cjs && node skills/auto/scripts/auto-contract.test.cjs && node skills/auto/scripts/forgecode-adapter.test.cjs && node skills/auto/scripts/codex-adapter.test.cjs && node skills/auto/scripts/claude-adapter.test.cjs && node skills/auto/scripts/hooks.test.cjs
scripts.lint: node scripts/validate-forgekit.cjs && node scripts/validate-registry.cjs && node scripts/validate-skills.cjs

author: LGM MMO
